description: Rules for all files containing 'use server' directive

rules.description: Every exported async function must call requireChef(), requireClient(), requireAuth(), requireAdmin(), or requirePartner() before any database query
Every .from() query must include .eq('tenant_id', ...) derived from session, not request body
'use server' files can only export async functions — never export const/let/var/class
rules.note: export type and export interface are allowed (erased at compile time)

rules.description: Notifications, emails, activity logs must be wrapped in try/catch and never throw
